---
title: "CV"
---

## Curriculum Vitae

[Download full CV (PDF)](cv_scheffel.pdf)

## Education

**PhD in Mathematics**, University of Stuttgart
2023–2026 (expected)
Advisor: Marco Oesting
Topic: Long memory in extreme value analysis

**MSc in Mathematics**, University of Stuttgart
2020–2023
Advisor: Jürgen Dippon
Thesis: A novel weighted mean approach to estimate the distribution function of potential outcomes in observational studies—an asymptotic analysis

**BSc in Mathematics**, University of Stuttgart
2016–2020

**BMus in Church Music**, HMDK Stuttgart
2013–2018

## Work

**Research Assistant**, Institute of Stochastics and Applications, University of Stuttgart
2023–present
